task_completion.description: The BMW benchmark car model is loaded in Blender.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender is open and the viewport displays the BMW27 car model.

task_completion.description: The camera is configured for a true isometric view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Camera properties show 'Type' set to 'Orthographic', 'Rotation X' set to approximately 54.7 degrees, and 'Rotation Z' set to 45 degrees (or 135, 225, 315).

task_completion.description: The background plane is removed and the car fills 80-90% of the camera frame.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The floor/ground plane is hidden or deleted from the scene. The camera view boundary shows the car taking up the vast majority (80-90%) of the visible frame.

task_completion.description: Render resolution is set to 512x512 and transparency is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Output properties show Resolution X and Y both set to 512. Render properties show 'Transparent' checked under the 'Film' section.

task_completion.description: The rendered isometric icon is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or image viewer shows 'iso_icon.png' saved in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/'. The image should display the isometric BMW car with a transparent (checkerboard) background.

task_completion.description: The Blender project file is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender window title bar displays 'iso_setup.blend' or a file manager shows 'iso_setup.blend' saved in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with Blender to achieve the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating Blender's GUI, adjusting camera/render settings, or using Blender's Python console, rather than just downloading or moving pre-made files.

integrity.description: The rendered image is genuinely produced from the BMW model.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final 'iso_icon.png' clearly depicts the specific Blender BMW27 benchmark car, not a generic car image obtained from the internet.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply create empty or mock files to bypass the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The saved .blend and .png files are the result of actual rendering and saving processes within Blender, not created via 'touch' or basic text editors.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target render resolution is exactly 512x512 pixels. True isometric camera setup requires Orthographic projection with X rotation at ~54.7 degrees (54.7356) and Z rotation at 45 degrees (or 135, 225, 315). The background object to be removed is typically named 'Plane'. Transparency must be enabled (Film -> Transparent in Blender). Expected output paths are exactly /home/ga/BlenderProjects/iso_icon.png and /home/ga/BlenderProjects/iso_setup.blend.
